documentation.content: A Find Me search ran on event-photo-api. The log entry's jsonPayload carries `guestName` (the name the searcher entered ‚Äî required at search time), `isGuest`, `uid`, `email`, `eventId`, `outcome`, and `resultCount`. Open the incident / log entry to see who searched. To alert on GUEST searches only, append `AND jsonPayload.isGuest=true` to the filter below.

conditions.displayName: Find Me search log lines from event-photo-api
